user.title: Dribl — Association
user.description:
⚠️ This is an unofficial, experimental integration — not affiliated with Dribl. Please cross-check game times and locations with your club before travelling.

Enter the Dribl association subdomain. You can find this in the URL when you visit your competition fixtures page (e.g. **nwsf** from `nwsf.dribl.com`).

club.title: Dribl — Select Club
club.description: Select your club from the {association} association.

league.title: Dribl — Select Team
league.description: Select the specific team (age group / division) for {club} in {competition}.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Dribl. Check the association name and try again.
error.no_leagues: No teams found for this club and competition. Try a different competition.
